name: Crock Pot Meatballs with Gravy
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
Combine first 7 ingredients to make 1-inch meatballs. Brown in a skillet.
Drain fat. Place in a Crock-Pot. Cover. Cook on Low for 3 to 4 hours or can be kept on all day. When ready to serve, prepare gravy mix as directed on the package and pour into meatballs. Stir. Serve over rice.
